Seating Chart Generator

Paste your roster, pick a room layout, add constraints — keep these two apart, keep those together, lock someone to the front — then shuffle until it works. Rosters stay in your browser.

1 · Roster

2 · Room layout

3 · Constraints

Tip: click 📌 on a desk to lock that student in place.

4 · Save / load

Front of room · whiteboard
desk locked constraint broken drag a name onto another desk to swap · tap two desks to swap on touch
Rosters never leave your browser — everything is stored locally · a max tool
